CSV compound_name is '5-(3-nitrobenzylidene)' but the evidence_quote and paper V1 entry describes '5-(2-Chlorobenzylidene)' with mp 292-293 °C. Substituent at C5 was misnamed; V5 in paper (3-nitrobenzylidene) actually has mp 235-237 °C. Q1 fail.
